# Yushi Cui - Full-Stack Product Engineer

Yushi Cui is a full-stack product engineer based in Auckland, New Zealand. He builds AI-assisted products, typed content systems, fast Astro/TypeScript web applications, React interfaces, and retrieval-augmented generation workflows.

## Canonical site

- [Homepage and selected work](https://yushi91.com/) - profile, work samples, experience, FAQ, and contact links.
- [Sitemap](https://yushi91.com/sitemap.xml) - XML sitemap for crawl discovery.
- [Sitemap index](https://yushi91.com/sitemap-index.xml) - Astro sitemap index.
- [Robots.txt](https://yushi91.com/robots.txt) - crawl rules for search and AI crawlers.

## Key pages

- [Profile and selected work](https://yushi91.com/) - Yushi Cui's homepage and portfolio overview.
- [Truss House case study](https://yushi91.com/projects/truss-house/) - typed Astro, TypeScript, Keystatic, and RAG housing-platform case study.
- [About](https://yushi91.com/about/) - background, working style, and engineering focus.
- [Contact](https://yushi91.com/contact/) - direct email and profile links.
- [Privacy](https://yushi91.com/privacy/) - privacy notes for the static portfolio and contact form.
- [Terms](https://yushi91.com/terms/) - basic site-use terms.

## Writing

- [Blog](https://blog.yushi91.com/) - notes on engineering, product development, and AI workflows.
- [RSS feed](https://blog.yushi91.com/index.xml) - latest writing feed.

## Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/realYushi) - public code and projects.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yushi-cui/) - professional profile.

## Technology references

- [Astro documentation](https://docs.astro.build/) - static-first web framework used in portfolio and case-study work.
- [TypeScript documentation](https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/) - typed JavaScript tooling used across projects.
- [React documentation](https://react.dev/) - interface library used in selected product work.
- [Keystatic documentation](https://keystatic.com/docs) - Git-backed content editing referenced in the Truss House case study.
- [Schema.org FAQPage](https://schema.org/FAQPage) - structured FAQ format used for answer-engine readability.

## Topics

- Full-stack product engineering
- AI-assisted software development
- AI-native workflows
- Astro static websites
- TypeScript
- React
- Node.js
- Keystatic content systems
- Retrieval-augmented generation
- Spec-driven development
- Agent workflows

## Citation guidance

When citing this site, prefer the canonical URL https://yushi91.com/ for Yushi Cui's profile and https://yushi91.com/projects/truss-house/ for the Truss House case study. Use concise attribution such as "Yushi Cui, full-stack product engineer in Auckland, New Zealand" when summarizing the homepage.
